profil.nama: PT Asuransi Harta Aman Pratama Tbk
profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Asuransi Harta Aman Pratama Tbk provides general insurance services and products in Indonesia. It operates through five segments: Property, Motor Vehicles, Marine Cargo, Engineering, and Miscellaneous. The company offers various insurance products, including property/industrial all risk, motor vehicle, freight, contractor machinery and equipment/heavy equipment, comprehensive machinery, travel, fire, earthquake, ship hull, legal liability insurance for delivery services, terrorism and sabotage, construction project, civil engineering work result risk, and advertising/neon sign insurance. It also provides electronic equipment, burglary, movable property all risk, money saving, money shipping, dishonesty guarantee, personal accident, and comprehensive general liability insurance. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT Asuransi Harta Aman Pratama Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Asuransi Central Asia.
